input.task:
Build a simple workflow with:
1. A Manual Trigger node
2. A Set node named "deny test" (no specific fields needed, just the node with that name)

Keep it minimal.
input.conversationContext: User wants a simple workflow with a manual trigger and a Set node named "deny test". No credentials needed.
input.reason: New simple workflow with manual trigger and a Set node — straightforward single-workflow build.
